title: prunus × vavilovii
intro: Prunus × vavilovii is a hybrid cherry tree species, resulting from the cross between Prunus cerasoides and Prunus fruticosa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headaches, and digestive issues. The plant's bark, leaves, and fruit are used in herbal preparations to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Prunus × vavilovii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
